inputs_required.notes: Required to complete flight search functionality - gates access to flight search results
Destination city/airport selection is required to perform flight search

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking where users can search for flights, hotels, and other travel services
steps.action: Navigate to the check-in page to explore check-in functionality
steps.goal: Exploring the check-in capability which is high priority (0.8 importance) and is on the exploration frontier

steps.screen: This is an error page indicating that the IndiGo check-in webpage cannot be reached due to a protocol error
steps.action: Navigate back to the homepage from the error page
steps.goal: Return to homepage to pursue flight search results page exploration, which is the highest priority frontier item

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking, allowing users to search for flights, hotels, and sightseeing options
steps.action: Tap the destination input field to see if it opens a destination search interface or requires manual input
steps.goal: Investigating the destination search interface (priority 0.8) which is needed before we can proceed to flight search results

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking, allowing users to search for flights, hotels, and sightseeing options with a flight search form as the primary interface
steps.action: Tap the departure date field to open the date picker interface
steps.goal: Explore the date picker interface from the frontier (priority 0.8)

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking, allowing users to search for flights, hotels, and sightseeing options with a flight search form as the primary interface
steps.action: Tap the destination input field to open destination search interface
steps.goal: Exploring the destination search interface from the frontier

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking, displaying promotional offers and deals for flights, hotels, and sightseeing options
steps.action: Tap the Book tab to navigate to the flight booking form
steps.goal: Explore the Flight booking form page (priority=0.9) from the exploration frontier

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking, displaying promotional offers and deals for flights, hotels, and sightseeing options
steps.action: Tap the 6EPick dropdown to open the 6EPick services page
steps.goal: Explore the 6EPick services page - the highest priority frontier item and a key differentiator for IndiGo

steps.screen: This is the 6EPick services page showing various travel-related services and offers including cabs, shopping, sightseeing, hotels, and destination packages
steps.action: Tap the Shop button to explore the shopping section for travel items and electronics
steps.goal: Exploring the 6EPick services page to understand the shopping functionality and complete coverage of this high-priority frontier item

steps.screen: This is the 6EPick services page showing various travel-related services and promotional offers including cabs, shopping, sightseeing, hotels, and destination packages
steps.action: Tap the Shop button to explore the shopping section for travel items and electronics
steps.goal: Shopping page with travel products (priority=0.7) - exploring the shopping_services capability which is a differentiating feature

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking with promotional banners for various travel services including cabs, shopping, sightseeing, hotels, and destination packages
steps.action: Tap the Shop button to explore the shopping section for travel items and electronics
steps.goal: Shopping page with travel products (priority=0.7) - exploring IndiGo's differentiating shopping integration feature

steps.screen: This is a marketplace disclaimer modal that users must accept before entering the 6EPick shopping section of the IndiGo platform
steps.action: Check the consent checkbox to enable the Continue button
steps.goal: Shopping page with travel products - exploring the shopping_services capability which is a differentiator for IndiGo

steps.screen: This is a marketplace disclaimer modal requiring user consent before accessing the 6EPick shopping section
steps.action: Tap the Continue button to enter the 6EPick marketplace shopping section
steps.goal: Shopping page with travel products (priority=0.7) - exploring the shopping_services capability and 6EPick differentiator

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking and travel services, displaying promotional offers and deals for flights, hotels, sightseeing, and destination packages
steps.action: Tap the Book link to navigate to the flight booking form
steps.goal: Flight booking form page (priority=0.9) - exploring the core flight booking capability

steps.screen: This is the main homepage for IndiGo airline booking and travel services, displaying promotional offers and deals for flights, hotels, sightseeing, and destination packages
steps.action: Tap the Trips dropdown to open trip management options
steps.goal: Trips management page (priority=0.8) - exploring trip_management capability
